title: Partial Fraction Expansions
summary: This page explains how to use MATLAB's residue command to compute partial fraction expansions of rational functions F(x) = B(x)/A(x). It describes the input/output structure of the command, including vectors R (coefficients), P (roots), and K (direct terms), and demonstrates its use with a complex example involving repeated roots. The residuez function for discrete-time systems is also briefly mentioned.
